label: create
detail: Global.create(ctx: EyeCandyScriptContext, state: object, blockEyecandy: BlockEyecandy): void
documentation: Called when a Decoration Object block is rendered for the first time. Used for initialization operations like creating dynamic textures.

label: render
detail: Global.render(ctx: EyeCandyScriptContext, state: object, blockEyecandy: BlockEyecandy): void
documentation: Called at-most once per frame (or less if performance is low) to render contents. Executed in a separate thread to maintain FPS.

label: dispose
detail: Global.dispose(ctx: EyeCandyScriptContext, state: object, blockEyecandy: BlockEyecandy): void
documentation: Called when the Decoration Object block goes out of sight. Used for releasing resources like dynamic textures.

label: EyeCandyScriptContext
documentation: The primary context object passed to eyecandy lifecycle functions for rendering and world interaction.

label: drawModel
documentation: Requests JCM to render a model loaded via ModelManager. If matrices is null, the model is centered without transformation.

label: setDebugInfo
documentation: Output debugging information to the screen overlay. Requires 'Script Debug Overlay' to be enabled in settings.

label: getRenderManager
documentation: Obtain a RenderManager instance for rendering custom elements into the Minecraft world.

label: getSoundManager
documentation: Obtain a SoundManager instance to play sounds relative to the block's position.

label: events
documentation: Returns the EyecandyEvents object for checking and handling interaction events.

label: setOutlineShape
documentation: Sets the visual hitbox (outline) of the eyecandy. No effect if the player is holding a brush.

label: setCollisionShape
documentation: Sets the physical hitbox (collision) of the eyecandy. No effect if the player is holding a brush.

label: BlockEyecandy
documentation: Represents a Decoration Block (Eyecandy) placed in the world.

label: getModelId
documentation: Returns the identifier of the model/prefab currently assigned to this block.

label: getTranslateX
documentation: Returns the GUI-configured translation on the X-axis in meters.

label: getRotateY
documentation: Returns the GUI-configured rotation on the Y-axis in radians.

label: pos
documentation: Returns the exact position of the block including GUI-configured translations.

label: blockPos
documentation: Returns the base coordinates of the eyecandy block.

label: facing
documentation: Returns the Minecraft direction the block is facing. Useful for VoxelShape alignment.

label: isCrosshairTarget
documentation: Returns true if the player is currently looking at this specific block.

label: redstoneLevel
documentation: Returns the redstone power level (0-15) currently powering the block.

label: EyecandyEvents
documentation: Used to detect and handle specific block-related events like clicks.

label: onBlockUse
documentation: Event triggered when the block is right-clicked (excluding brush usage).

label: handled
documentation: Resets the current event state. Should be called after processing onBlockUse.

label: BlockUseEvent
documentation: Contains details about a right-click interaction with the block.

label: occurred
documentation: Returns true if a block use interaction has been initiated.

label: detail
documentation: Returns detailed information about the player and item involved in the interaction.

label: player
documentation: Returns the PlayerEntity who interacted with the block.

label: item
documentation: Returns the ItemStack the player was holding during the interaction.
